title: isothermalFlash operation
description: Operation block of an isothermal two-phase flash.  Both T and P are optional overrides of the feed-stream conditions; leaving them out runs the flash at the feed T and P (natural propagation through a flowsheet).

T.title: Operating temperature
T.description: Override the feed temperature.  If omitted, the flash inherits the feed T.

P.title: Operating pressure
P.description: Override the feed pressure.  If omitted, the flash inherits the feed P.
